Bash(powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "
\\$action  = New-ScheduledTaskAction -Execute 'C:\\Users\\Socrates Cabral\\AppData\\Local\\Python\\pythoncore-3.14-64\\python.exe' -Argument 'C:\\ClaudeWork\\WMS_Automatizacion\\wms_watchdog.py' -WorkingDirectory 'C:\\ClaudeWork'
\\$trigger = New-ScheduledTaskTrigger -Weekly -DaysOfWeek Monday,Tuesday,Wednesday,Thursday,Friday -At '09:30AM'
\\$settings = New-ScheduledTaskSettingsSet -ExecutionTimeLimit \(New-TimeSpan -Minutes 5\) -StartWhenAvailable
Register-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'WMS Egakat - Watchdog Alerta' -Action \\$action -Trigger \\$trigger -Settings \\$settings -RunLevel Limited -Force
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'WMS Egakat - Watchdog Alerta' | Select-Object TaskName, State; Get-ScheduledTaskInfo -TaskName 'WMS Egakat - Watchdog Alerta' | Select-Object NextRunTime")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ScheduledTaskInfo -TaskName 'WMS Egakat - Watchdog Alerta' | Format-List NextRunTime, LastRunTime")
